message:
fix(quickjs): defer var_ref freeing in gc_free_cycles to prevent use-after-free

The GC cycle freeing code was freeing var_refs directly, but functions
in the same cycle would later try to access those var_refs in their
finalizers, causing use-after-free.

Fix:
1. Free var_ref's captured value immediately (while objects are valid)
2. Set ref_count=0 so free_var_ref() skips already-freed var_refs
3. Move var_ref to deferred list instead of freeing immediately
4. Free var_ref structs after all finalizers have run

This fixes Exit 133 crash when running TSC without frozen interpreter.

Verified with AddressSanitizer - no more heap-use-after-free errors.
